summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical. No security-sensitive refs were detected, close/low-signal/fix/merge paths are disabled by the job/fix artifact, and each open PR is retained or routed to the exact maintainer decision still needed.

actions.reason: Focused Codex cost-accounting change needs maintainer technical review of the unresolved cache-version/stored-cost compatibility concern before any merge path.
Keep open until maintainers decide whether to standardize the public recovery-card/recovery-note terminology; no low-signal close is allowed in this job.
Public config compatibility plus a red proof check require maintainer/author follow-up; merge and fix actions are not allowed here.
Potentially superseded by an unhydrated fix path and still has a red proof check; needs maintainer decision before any close or merge path.
Small provider/skill availability change is plausible, but green-check and maintainer review gates are not satisfied in this worker.
Opt-in streaming event needs maintainer product/compatibility review and author follow-up; no fix or merge action is permitted.
Broad docs accuracy rewrite is not closable in this job and needs maintainer docs/product judgment before merge.
Retain independently as an open linked bug-fix PR; it is blocked on proof/check reconciliation, not a duplicate or low-signal cleanup target.
Draft provider feature should stay open for author proof/default-selection validation; no close, fix, or merge path is allowed.
Maintainers need to choose the canonical rawArgs mitigation between #88085 and #91193 and resolve the conflict/check blocker before any closure or merge path.
Keep within the rawArgs subfamily as a hydrated linked candidate needing maintainer canonical-path selection with #88085.
